name: Breadman's Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your Breadman bread machine manual.
2. Add the water, applesauce, honey, egg (or liquid), potato flakes, powdered milk, salt, and yeast to the bread machine pan according to your manufacturer's instructions.
3. Select the appropriate dough cycle on your Breadman bread machine.
4. Follow the remaining instructions as directed by your bread machine manual.
5. When the baking cycle is complete, carefully remove the bread from the pan and let it cool on a wire rack before serving.
